This is worrisome...
I could use your help in this battle.

Well, that went smoothly.
If something comes up again, I'll call on you.

Too bad--looks like they got away.
Let's take this chance to catch some R&R.

Just who I was hoping to see.
Won't you fight alongside me?

Hm, not bad.
I hope we fight together again.
Let's not waste time giving chase.
